emails.subject: Nicor Storage Spreadsheet
emails.body: Nicor Storage Spreadsheet Hey Bossman, We're still waiting on Kam to provide the P.V. Factors, she's having trouble locating, but we have the spreadsheet almost complete. I'll send it as soon as she gets the values. Patrice
